event_blocks.summary: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, begins her back-to-school shopping trip at Target Store, motivated by viewer demand and a planned giveaway. After an enthusiastic greeting to her viewers from her car, she enters the brightly lit store, where upbeat music plays. She browses colorful displays of school supplies, initially looking for gel pens and highlighters, and expresses excitement upon finding desired items. Kylin examines various highlighters, including Sharpie S NOTE and Zebra Mildliner sets, deciding to get the latter for the giveaway. She selects Yoobi color-changing markers, noting their charitable aspect, and places them in her red shopping basket. Moving to notebooks, she chooses a green Five Star notebook with dividers, a plain white notebook, and a solid-colored wide-ruled notebook, appreciating their simplicity and color. She also looks for a planner, selecting a small pink 'Student Planning Calendar' but expressing reservations about its color. Throughout her shopping, on-screen text in English and Chinese provides additional commentary. Kylin then examines a pink 'Organized' planner, favoring its color scheme and layout, and expresses her fondness for the Five Star brand. In the pen section, she picks up Sharpie Clear View highlighters for the giveaway and considers regular Sharpie highlighters as well. She plans to get a colorful pack of Paper Mate gel pens, remarking on the extensive pen options, and also selects Post-it notes and black gel pens for the giveaway. Remembering the need for pencils, she chooses a pack of BIC mechanical pencils, deeming them the best. She adds Yoobi markers to her basket, noting the availability of other brands like Pilot and Uniball. Kylin also finds and selects file folders, specifically liking the Five Star brand and choosing a white floral and a pink geometric folder. Her red shopping basket becomes heavy, and she notes the heat in the store. Although she finds the binder section, she decides to purchase binders from Staples, preferring their durability. She observes low stock on some shelves. Kylin expresses nostalgia for locker decorations and picks up a purple 'Reinforced Quad Ruled' notebook, placing it in her basket. She mentions planning to visit Staples for items not found at Target and expresses excitement about the giveaway items. She points out plain composition notebooks and loose leaf and graph paper. Kylin then expresses her love for 'Simple Modern' water bottles, selecting a purple one. She remarks on the abundance of backpacks, contrasting it with past experiences. She picks up a green-packaged Ticonderoga pencil pack, recalling her preference for mechanical pencils over number two pencils for tests. She adds ruled index cards to her basket, preferring colored ones for studying. Kylin notes the time is 2:39 PM and she has been shopping for an hour, finding it a long duration, before heading to checkout, where the sound of a scanner is heard. On-screen text indicates her self-consciousness about filming in public.

Target Store.description: A brightly lit retail environment with colorful school supply displays, including shelves stocked with file folders, binders, and backpacks, featuring prominent signage like 'all in motion' and 'only at Target'. Kylin refers to it as one of the stores she's visiting, and the distinct sound of a scanner is heard as she checks out.

School Supplies.description: Various stationery items including vibrant 'Simple Modern' water bottles, backpacks (including a Hello Kitty design), green-packaged Ticonderoga pencils (referred to by Kylin as 'number two pencils' for testing), and 'colored' ruled index cards (her stated favorite for studying), displayed on shelves with price tags and brand labels.

Kylin.description: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, actively browsing school supplies in Target, engaging directly with the camera. She speaks about her shopping list, her love for 'Simple Modern' water bottles, her past difficulties finding backpacks, her preference for mechanical pencils over 'number two pencils' for testing, and her favorite 'colored' index cards for studying. She also expresses feeling 'awkward' filming in public and notes the time and duration of her shopping trip before checking out.

Red Shopping Basket.description: A red plastic basket with circular perforations, used by Kylin to collect selected school supplies, visible as she places file folders and a gray binder inside.

Purple Notebook.description: A 'Reinforced Quad Ruled' notebook with a purple cover, picked up and examined by Kylin before being placed in her shopping basket.

On-Screen Text.description: Text overlay reading 'gets so awkward filming in public' appears briefly as Kylin holds up her red shopping basket and makes a peace sign, directly correlating with her verbalized feeling of awkwardness.

Ruled Index Cards.description: A pack of ruled index cards in purple packaging, picked up by Kylin, who states they are her 'favorite for studying' and that she prefers 'colored ones' because they're 'more exciting' than plain white ones, before adding them to her shopping basket.

Black Smartphone.description: A black smartphone held by Kylin, briefly shown as she gestures while speaking to the camera.

Ticonderoga Pencils.description: A green-packaged pack of 18 sharpened Ticonderoga pencils, held and examined by Kylin, who recalls hating having to use 'number two pencils' for Scantrons and testing, preferring mechanical pencils, before placing them into her red shopping basket.

raw_segments: The video opens with an upbeat music track accompanying a vibrant montage of school supplies on shelves at Target, with text overlays announcing 'school supplies shopping @ target' and 'travel & giveaway.' Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White' logo, then appears in her car, greeting viewers with an enthusiastic "Hey guys, what's up? It's Kylin, welcome back to my channel." She explains her destination, "We are going to Target and we are going back to school shopping," driven by viewer demand as she wants to "give the people what they want." Kylin, speaking with expressive hand gestures, clarifies that while she needs some items, the main purpose is a giveaway for "one lucky winner," before excitedly declaring, "Let's head on over to the one and only Target. Let's go!" The scene transitions to an exterior shot of the Target store, followed by her entering the brightly lit interior. Inside, as the upbeat music continues, she walks through colorful displays of school supplies, addressing the camera, "Alright guys, we just got here in Target. We're gonna shop around, get our back to school supplies." She mentions her intention to buy items like gel pens and highlighters, as the camera pans across shelves filled with various stationery, including brands like Sharpie and Pilot, before she exclaims, "You guys, I found all of the..." indicating her discovery of desired items.

Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt, actively browses the brightly lit school supply section of a Target Store, her hand adorned with a silver ring frequently visible as she examines items. She begins by looking at various highlighters, including Sharpie S NOTE and Zebra Mildliner sets, stating in a clear, conversational voice, "I think I definitely want to get some of these" and plans to get the "midliners" for a giveaway. She then picks up a set of Yoobi color-changing markers, noting their charitable aspect ('YOU BUY, YOOBI GIVES'), and places them into her red shopping basket. Moving on to notebooks, she expresses, "I really like the Five Star notebook," and selects a green one with dividers, commenting, "I really like this color" and "This is a hefty one." She also chooses a plain white notebook and a simple, solid-colored wide-ruled one, stating, "I just like the simple ones." Finally, she searches for a planner, explaining, "a planner is definitely something I need to get, and I'm also going to get one for the giveaway." She examines a small pink 'Student Planning Calendar' with a floral design, noting, "I like how small this one is, but I don't love..." the color. Throughout her shopping, shelves are organized with orange dividers, displaying price tags and brand labels, while on-screen text provides her thoughts in both English and Chinese.

In a brightly lit Target store, Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, actively browses the vibrant school supply displays. She begins by examining a pink 'Organized' planner, expressing her preference for its 'color scheme' and academic layout, while also noting her fondness for Five Star brand items, stating, "I love the Five Star brand." Moving to the pen section, she picks up a pack of Sharpie Clear View highlighters, commenting, "I do love the Clear View Sharpies," and decides to get them for a giveaway, also considering regular Sharpie highlighters for the same purpose. Kylin confirms, "we're here in the actual like pen section," and plans to get a colorful set of Paper Mate gel pens for the giveaway, remarking on the extensive selection: "They have so many pen options, it's actually crazy." She considers standard black pens but emphasizes her love for 'a variety pack' and 'so many color options.' She then selects Post-it notes, saying, "Let me also get some Post-its for the giveaway as well," and adds black gel pens to her red shopping basket with circular perforations. Remembering, she states, "I need to get pencils for the giveaway as well," picking up a pack of BIC mechanical pencils, which she deems "the best pack in my opinion." Finally, she adds a set of Yoobi markers to her basket, noting the variety of options like Pilot and Uniball pens available on the well-stocked shelves with visible price tags.

The video opens in a brightly lit Target Store, where Kylin, a young woman in a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, browses colorful file folders. Her clear, conversational voice is heard commenting on "these ones" and stating, "Obviously we need to get some folders and I love the five-star ones, so we'll get one of these." She finds "really cute ones" and describes a white floral folder and a pink geometric one, both priced at $2.39, as "really pretty." Deciding to take "one of each," she places them into her red shopping basket with a distinct clunk. The camera then pans to a wall of backpacks, and Kylin, holding her now heavier basket, turns to the camera with an excited, expressive look, remarking that "backpacks have gotten significantly cuter over the years." She then struggles slightly, noting, "Alright guys, our basket pretty full and very heavy right now. I'm barely able to lift it up," and further adds, "she's getting really heavy right now," while also complaining, "I'm like sweating in here. It is so hot." Moving to a section of 3-inch heavy-duty Avery binders, available in gray, purple, and other colors at $11.39, Kylin inspects a gray one. Despite finding "the actual binder section" and acknowledging "a lot of options here," she states her decision to go to Staples for binders, explaining, "I like the Staple brand binders the best" because "the Staple ones are just more durable." The camera sweeps across shelves displaying various school supplies like notebooks and folders, before panning to an empty pegboard wall with only a few remaining items, visually confirming low stock, which Kylin alludes to by saying, "I don't even know if they're all stocked yet because..." Throughout, the consistent ambient hum of the Target Store is audible.

The video opens with a close-up of shelves stocked with school supplies, including file folders and binders in pastel and neutral tones, with price tags visible, accompanied by upbeat instrumental background music. Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is seen browsing the brightly lit aisles of Target Store. She remarks, "There's like nothing on this wall yet. Maybe I came too early," and notes, "They have some really cute whiteboards too, but I definitely don't need that." She continues, expressing nostalgia, "They have so much cute locker stuff here, and it's really making me miss when I had a locker many, many, many years ago." As she speaks, she picks up a purple 'Reinforced Quad Ruled' notebook, examining it closely before placing it into her red shopping basket, which features circular perforations. She explains her shopping strategy, "Alright guys, I'm just walking around right now, seeing if there's anything I forgot. I am going to go to Staples too though, so whatever I didn't get here, I can always get over there." She adds, "But we're doing pretty good so far. I got a lot of stuff, and I got a lot of good stuff for the giveaway too, which I'm excited for," promising to explain the rules later. She gestures expressively while speaking to the camera, occasionally glancing around at the colorful displays of school supplies, including orange bins filled with notebooks and folders, with signage like 'college ruled notebooks' and 'all in motion' visible. She points out, "They also have some plain like composition notebooks here as well. I haven't used one of these in a while though," and mentions "some loose leaf and graph paper." At one point, she holds up the red shopping basket, making a peace sign, while text on screen reads 'gets so awkward filming in public,' indicating her self-awareness. She then whispers, "Why are there so many people here today? I probably should have made a list on my phone of everything to get so that I didn't forget anything, 'cause I really don't want to forget anything for..." as she continues to navigate the aisle, passing shelves with water bottles and other stationery, maintaining an engaged and animated demeanor throughout the store's general ambiance.

The video opens with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, walking through the brightly lit aisles of Target Store, engaging directly with the camera. She speaks about not having a list and apologizing if she's missing anything, noting she thinks she has "more than enough" and that they're also going to "a whole 'nother store." She gestures expressively as she browses colorful school supplies, including shelves stocked with vibrant water bottles and backpacks. She expresses her love for "Simple Modern" water bottles, commenting on their good size and identifying one as "so me" and another as "really cute," before picking up a purple 'SIMPLE MODERN' water bottle. The camera then pans across shelves displaying various backpacks and lunch bags, including a Hello Kitty design, as Kylin remarks on the abundance of backpacks now, contrasting it with her past experience of never being able to find one in-store and always having to go online. She then moves to a display of school supplies, selecting a green-packaged Ticonderoga pencil pack, recalling how she "always hated" having to use "number two pencils" for Scantrons and testing, preferring mechanical pencils. She places the pencils into her red shopping basket, which already contains a purple notebook. She continues to browse, picking up a pack of ruled index cards, stating they are her "favorite for studying" and that she prefers "colored ones" because they're "more exciting" than plain white ones, before placing them in the basket. The camera briefly focuses on her holding a black smartphone, then cuts to a close-up of her hand placing a gray binder into the basket. The scene ends with Kylin holding up the red shopping basket, making a peace sign, while she verbally expresses "That is so awkward, oh my gosh," and the on-screen text 'gets so awkward filming in public' appears briefly. She then notes the time is "2:39" and she's been there for "an hour already," which is "very long," before stating they are "gonna check out now." The distinct sound of a scanner is heard as she concludes her shopping. Throughout the segment, background music plays, complementing the retail atmosphere of Target Store.

event_blocks.summary: At a Target counter, Kylin scanned a pack of Ticonderoga pencils and a purple notebook, placing them into a red shopping bag. In her car, she announced, "All right guys, we just dropped over $100 on school supplies at Target," and expressed her intention to visit Staples, noting, "there is a chance that I did come a little bit early." After a countdown, she arrived at the Staples store and entered an aisle with binders, stating, "All right, perfect, we found the binders," and decided to purchase a gray, 1½ inch Staples brand binder. Later, admiring planners and calendars at Staples, she commented, "I should have waited... this one's so pretty, I would have gotten this one," and recommended the store for planners. She then selected a 'twellly' container, 'Mighty Patch' acne strips, and sticky notes, deeming them "perfect for an emergency kit" for school supplies like "little vitamins or supplements," "little bandages," and "blemish patches." Kylin, wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, concluded by praising the store's "so much good stuff," including "little beauty blenders" and "hair ties," and teased an upcoming "emergency kit" reveal.

Purple Notebook.description: A 'Reinforced Quad Ruled' notebook with a purple cover, picked up and examined by Kylin before being placed in her shopping basket.

Target Store.description: A brightly lit retail environment with colorful school supply displays, including shelves stocked with file folders, binders, and backpacks, featuring prominent signage like 'all in motion' and 'only at Target'.

Staples Store.description: An office supply store with red metal shelving, explicitly identified by the speaker as 'Staples,' which she recommends visiting for planners and praises for having 'really stepped up their game' with a good selection of products.

Ruled Index Cards.description: A pack of ruled index cards in purple packaging, picked up and added to Kylin's shopping basket.

Black Smartphone.description: A black smartphone held by Kylin, briefly shown as she gestures while speaking to the camera.

Ticonderoga Pencils.description: A green-packaged pack of 18 sharpened Ticonderoga pencils, held and examined by Kylin before being placed into her red shopping basket.

Red Shopping Basket.description: A red plastic basket with circular perforations, used by Kylin to collect selected school supplies, visible as she places file folders and a gray binder inside.

School Supplies.description: Various stationery items including file folders with floral and geometric designs, 3-inch heavy-duty Avery binders in gray and purple, and backpacks in multiple colors, displayed on shelves with price tags and brand labels.

Kylin.description: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, actively browsing and speaking directly to the camera with an enthusiastic and engaging voice, providing recommendations and expressing strong opinions on the products, noting 'Staples has really stepped up their game' and teasing a future 'emergency kit' video, also mentioning 'little beauty blenders' and 'hair ties' as other items she's seeing.

On-Screen Text.description: Text overlay reading 'gets so awkward filming in public' appears briefly as Kylin holds up her red shopping basket and makes a peace sign.

Sticky Notes.description: Colorful packs of sticky notes in pastel shades, held and examined by Kylin before being placed into her shopping basket.

Health and Wellness Products.description: Travel-sized health items including 'twellly' bandages, 'Mighty Patch' acne strips, and hydration supplements, arranged on black shelving units, identified by the speaker as 'minis' and 'perfect for an emergency kit,' specifically mentioning 'vitamins or supplements,' 'little bandages,' 'blemish patches,' and 'Liquid IV,' all deemed suitable for a school emergency kit.

Planners and Calendars.description: A variety of spiral-bound planners and calendars with floral, citrus, and solid color designs, displayed on metal racks, described by the speaker as 'so pretty,' available in 'smaller' sizes, and including 'clipboard ones,' with the speaker expressing strong preference and regret over not having chosen certain designs.

raw_segments: The segment opens with the distinct beeping sounds of a checkout scanner as Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, processes school supplies at a Target counter. She scans a pack of Ticonderoga pencils and a purple notebook, placing them into a red Target shopping bag with black polka dots. Transitioning to her car, Kylin holds the red shopping bag and speaks to the camera, gesturing with her hands, exclaiming, "All right guys, we just dropped over $100 on school supplies at Target." She adds that she's "still not even done" and plans to go to Staples, expressing concern that Staples might still be stocking shelves, saying, "there is a chance that I did come a little bit early." The scene then shows her driving, with car sounds audible, as she announces, "we're gonna drive to Staples," counting down "in three, two, one." Upon arrival, an exterior shot of the Staples store with its red and white signage is shown. Inside, Kylin walks through an aisle filled with colorful 3-inch binders and file folders, holding her black smartphone. She states, "All right guys, I am looking for binders," and then confirms, "All right, perfect, we found the binders." The camera pans across shelves displaying gray, red, yellow, green, blue, and purple binders, each labeled '1½ inch' and '100 sheet'. Kylin reaches out to touch a gray binder, noting, "I always love getting the Staples brand binders, the one and a half inch. We'll definitely get one of these." Her movements are deliberate and focused, reflecting her intent to gather school supplies in the utilitarian, well-organized Staples environment.

The segment opens with a close-up of a metal display rack showcasing colorful planners and calendars, featuring floral patterns and solid colors with visible price tags. A hand reaches in to pick up a blue floral planner, flipping through its clean, organized pages, while a young woman's voice expresses enthusiasm, saying, "I really like this one," and wishing she had seen it earlier: "I should have waited... this one's so pretty, I would have gotten this one." She continues to admire the designs, noting "this one's really pretty too" and that "they have it in smaller" sizes, recommending, "if you're looking for planners, come to Staples." The camera pans across the shelf, highlighting various designs including an orange cover and a citrus motif, as the voice praises "clipboard ones" and "such a pretty design," adding, "Staples has really stepped up their game." The scene transitions to a different section with red metal shelving, where the hand selects a small, pastel 'twellly' container, followed by 'Mighty Patch' acne strips and colorful sticky notes. The voice identifies these as "so many minis" and "perfect for an emergency kit," specifically mentioning "little vitamins or supplements," "little bandages," and "blemish patches," stating, "all of these would go so perfect in a little emergency kit for school." A 'BUY 3, GET 1 FREE' sign is briefly shown. The segment concludes with a wider shot of Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, standing in the aisle, gesturing as she speaks directly to the camera, continuing to praise the store's offerings, "I freaking love Liquid IV too. They have so much good stuff," and teasing, "Stay tuned for my emergency kit." She also points out "little beauty blenders" and "hair ties," concluding, "just so much stuff." The retail environment is brightly lit and organized.

event_blocks.summary: In a brightly lit Staples store, Kylin, wearing a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, enthusiastically browsed office supplies, expressing surprise at the variety, including Burt's Bees lip balms and mouthwash, before selecting a yellow pack of sticky notes and a light blue Staples 3-Ring View Binder, placing them in a red shopping basket. She also noted Martha Stewart large paper clips, unaware of her stationery line. The scene then shifted to a softly lit home setting where Kylin, seated before a potted plant, announced a giveaway requiring viewers to subscribe and follow her Instagram handle '@kyla.malloy', displayed on-screen. Transitioning to her school supply haul, she humorously described transporting the items as her workout, showcasing the Martha Stewart paper clips and the two binders from Staples, explaining her preference for the blue binder over plain white and black. From a red Target shopping bag, she revealed patterned notebooks with green geometric and floral designs, and a white spiral notebook with a green label, along with a mint green spiral notebook, noting she also acquired a plain white Five Star folder. Kylin then held up a white Five Star spiral notebook, highlighting its 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject' features, and mentioned getting several other Five Star notebooks with geometric marble and swooshy patterns, declaring them the best. She presented a pink spiral-bound '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar' with dividers, followed by a 6-pack of colorful Ubi gel pens, expressing her long-standing fondness for the brand. Finally, she showcased a Paper Mate InkJoy gel pen set with 10 vibrant colors, calling them her favorite and go-to pens for years, and a Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencil set, confirming her preference for these mechanical pencils over standard ones, all while her light pink manicured nails and silver ring were visible as she gestured.

On-Screen Text.description: Text overlay reading '-subscribe', '-follow my insta', '-comment' appears on the right side of the screen, prompting viewer engagement.

Sticky Notes.description: Colorful packs of sticky notes in pastel shades, held and examined by Kylin before being placed into her red shopping basket.

Staples 3-Ring View Binder.description: A light blue 3-ring view binder, explicitly mentioned by Kylin as one of 'two binders from Staples' she purchased, chosen for its 'really pretty blue color' over plain white and black options.

Staples Store.description: An office supply store with red and white exterior signage reading 'STAPLES The Office Superstore', featuring well-lit aisles stocked with binders, file folders, and office supplies, organized on red metal shelving units. Kylin expresses surprise and enthusiasm for the variety of items available, stating, 'I am shook right now by how much Staples has. Staples wasn't playing.'

Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips.description: A white carded package containing three large gold paper clips, labeled 'Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips', held by Kylin and shown to the camera.

Home Setting.description: A softly lit indoor environment with a gray wall, wooden floor, and a large potted plant in a woven basket, where Kylin sits and speaks to the camera while displaying school supplies.

Red Shopping Basket.description: A red plastic basket with circular perforations, used by Kylin to collect selected school supplies, visible as she places sticky notes and a blue binder inside.

Target Shopping Bag.description: A red reusable shopping bag with white polka dots and the Target logo, held by Kylin as she announces it contains 'everything that I got from Target' before revealing its contents.

Kylin.description: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, seated in a softly lit home setting, speaking directly to the camera in an enthusiastic and conversational tone, expressing strong personal preferences and details about the school supplies she showcases with expressive hand gestures. Her nails are neatly manicured with a light pink polish, and she wears a delicate silver ring on her right hand.

Paper Mate InkJoy Gel Pen Set.description: A blister-packaged set of 10 colorful Paper Mate InkJoy gel pens in a rainbow gradient, held by Kylin and displayed prominently. She declares them her 'favorite pens by Paper Mate' and her 'go-to' that she has 'used these every single year'.

Gel Pens (6-pack).description: A cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens in pastel shades, held by Kylin. She identifies them as 'Ubi pens' and states she has 'gotten Ubi school supplies in the past and I really like them'.

Five Star Notebook.description: A white spiral-bound notebook with 'Five Star' branding, featuring product details like 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject' on the back cover, held and flipped by Kylin. She describes Five Star notebooks as 'literally the best notebooks out there,' mentioning she also acquired a 'green one' and others with 'geometric marble' and 'swooshy pattern' designs, highlighting her strong preference for them.

Paper Mate Clear Point Pencil Set.description: A blister-packaged set of 10 colored Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencils, held by Kylin. She identifies them as 'mechanical ones' and expresses a strong preference for using them 'over like a plain standard mechanical pencil'.

2025/26 Student Planning Calendar.description: A pink spiral-bound planner labeled '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar' with a 'Planner' title and a 'Pencil' icon, held up by Kylin. She confirms it says 'plans on it' and has 'dividers'.

raw_segments: The video opens with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, filming herself in a brightly lit Staples store. With an enthusiastic and conversational tone, she exclaims, "You guys, I am shook right now by how much Staples has. Staples wasn't playing," as she browses office supplies. She points out unexpected items like "Burt's Bees lip balms" and "mouthwash," encouraging viewers to "come to Staples." She picks up a yellow pack of sticky notes, noting, "I found these ones instead. And this is a really pretty color, so we'll do one of these," before placing it in her red shopping basket. She then selects a light blue Staples 3-Ring View Binder, confirming, "Alright guys, so we got what we came here for, which was binders." As she prepares to check out, she spots a package of Martha Stewart large paper clips, expressing surprise: "Look at these giant paper clips. It's by Martha Stewart too. I didn't know she came out with a stationery line, but it really popped off." She briefly mentions "a giant gold calculator" before the scene transitions to a softly lit home setting. Here, Kylin sits in front of a potted plant, holding up a red Target shopping bag with white polka dots. Speaking directly to the camera with expressive gestures, she announces, "Okay guys, so we're back from Target. I got a big bag of stuff. And now it's time to get into our our haul." She then reveals that "everything here is going to be in the giveaway," instructing viewers to "subscribe, follow my Instagram" to enter, with her handle '@kyla.malloy' displayed on screen.

The video transitions to a softly lit home setting where Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, sits in front of a gray wall with a large potted plant to her left. Speaking directly to the camera in a clear, conversational tone and using expressive hand gestures, Kylin first discusses a giveaway, instructing viewers to "subscribe," "follow my Instagram," and "comment down below something you're looking forward to in the coming year." On-screen text appears, reinforcing these calls to action: '-subscribe', '-follow my insta', '-comment'. Kylin then transitions to showcasing her school supply haul, humorously stating that "dragging this back into the car was my workout for the day." She displays a white package of Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips, followed by a light blue Staples 3-Ring View Binder and a gray 3-ring binder, explaining she got "two binders from Staples" and chose the "really pretty blue color" because she figured viewers "didn't just want like plain white and black." Next, she holds up a red Target Shopping Bag, announcing it contains "everything that I got from Target." From the bag, she pulls out two patterned notebooks—one with a green geometric design and another with a floral motif—describing the first as a "green mosaic pattern" and expressing her dislike for "paper folders," clarifying they are "the exact same folder, just different designs." She then shows a white spiral notebook with a green label, followed by a mint green spiral notebook, noting she "needed folders" and just got a "plain white Five Star folder" because she's "boring and basic like that."

Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is seated in a softly lit home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant behind her, speaking directly to the camera in an enthusiastic and conversational tone. She begins by holding up a white Five Star spiral notebook, flipping it to show its 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject' details, while explaining that she got several Five Star notebooks, including a "green one" and two others with "geometric marble" and "swooshy pattern" designs, declaring them "literally the best notebooks out there" and her strong preference. Next, she presents a pink spiral-bound '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar', noting it clearly says "plans on it" and has "dividers." She then displays a cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens, identifying them as "Ubi pens" and expressing her long-standing liking for Ubi school supplies. Following this, she showcases a Paper Mate InkJoy gel pen set with 10 vibrant colors in a clear blister pack, calling them her "favorite pens by Paper Mate" and her "go-to" for years. Finally, she holds up a Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencil set, also in a blister pack, confirming they are "mechanical ones" and stating her preference for them over standard mechanical pencils before the audio cuts off. Throughout, her light pink manicured nails and silver ring are visible as she gestures, maintaining a calm, organized vlog-style review.

event_blocks.summary: In a home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant, Kylin, wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, presented a selection of school supplies. She began by holding up a 15-color set of Zebra Mildliner Creative Markers, explaining they function as both markers and highlighters due to their dual tips. Kylin then displayed pastel pink and yellow Post-it sticky notes, calling them a school year staple, followed by a pack of standard Sharpie highlighters. She enthusiastically showcased Sharpie paint markers with clear tips, praising their visibility for highlighting. A Five Star notebook was then revealed, with its 'Fights ink bleed' feature highlighted on the back. Kylin mentioned acquiring index cards and a small-sized planner for personal use. Concluding the vlog, she thanked viewers, reminded them about an upcoming giveaway winner announcement on Instagram and YouTube at the end of the month, and bid farewell as background music started, leading to an end screen with a video thumbnail, her profile picture, and 'subscribe new videos every week' text.

Kylin.description: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, seated in a home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant behind her, showcasing school supplies with expressive hand gestures and speaking to the camera in a clear, friendly voice about the products, a giveaway, and signing off.

raw_segments: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, sits in a home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant behind her, showcasing school supplies. She begins by holding up a package of Zebra Mildliner Creative Markers, a 15-color set with chisel and bullet tips, clarifying in her friendly voice, "I don't know if they're markers or highlighters... it's a marker and highlighter in one." She then displays two packs of pastel pink and yellow Post-it sticky notes, noting, "I feel like Post-its are a staple for the school year." Next, she presents a standard pack of Sharpie highlighters in vibrant colors, adding, "I figured you guys would just want some standard ones." Following this, she shows a set of Sharpie paint markers in bold neon shades, enthusiastically describing them as "the clear tip ones because these ones are seriously so great. I love the clear tip so you could see like where you're highlighting." She then holds up a Five Star notebook, flipping it to reveal product details like 'Fights ink bleed' on its back cover. After placing the notebook down, she speaks directly to the camera, mentioning that she also got "some index cards" and "a planner" for herself, expressing her liking for the planner's smaller size. She claps her hands together and concludes by addressing the camera, saying, "I hope you guys enjoyed this back to school shopping vlog. And don't forget to enter the giveaway... I'm going to be announcing the winner at the end of this month both on my Instagram and on here. And with that being said, I'll catch you guys in the next one. Bye guys!" as background music begins to play, transitioning to an end screen featuring a video thumbnail, her circular profile picture, and the cursive text 'subscribe new videos every week'.

global_entity_library.Target Store: A brightly lit retail environment with colorful school supply displays, including shelves stocked with file folders, binders, and backpacks, featuring prominent signage like 'all in motion' and 'only at Target'.

global_entity_library.Ticonderoga Pencils: A green-packaged pack of 18 sharpened Ticonderoga pencils, held and examined by Kylin before being placed into her red shopping basket.
global_entity_library.Staples Store: An office supply store with red and white exterior signage reading 'STAPLES The Office Superstore', featuring well-lit aisles stocked with binders, file folders, and office supplies, organized on red metal shelving units. Kylin expresses surprise and enthusiasm for the variety of items available, stating, 'I am shook right now by how much Staples has. Staples wasn't playing.'
global_entity_library.Sticky Notes: Colorful packs of sticky notes in pastel shades, held and examined by Kylin before being placed into her red shopping basket.
global_entity_library.Health and Wellness Products: Travel-sized health items including 'twellly' bandages, 'Mighty Patch' acne strips, and hydration supplements, arranged on black shelving units, identified by the speaker as 'minis' and 'perfect for an emergency kit,' specifically mentioning 'vitamins or supplements,' 'little bandages,' 'blemish patches,' and 'Liquid IV,' all deemed suitable for a school emergency kit.
global_entity_library.Planners and Calendars: A variety of spiral-bound planners and calendars with floral, citrus, and solid color designs, displayed on metal racks, described by the speaker as 'so pretty,' available in 'smaller' sizes, and including 'clipboard ones,' with the speaker expressing strong preference and regret over not having chosen certain designs.

global_entity_library.Gel Pens (6-pack): A cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens in pastel shades, held by Kylin. She identifies them as 'Ubi pens' and states she has 'gotten Ubi school supplies in the past and I really like them'.
